name: §dJerry
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Intelligence: §b-100

§6Jerry
§7Gain §a50% §7chance to deal your
§7regular damage

§6Jerry
§7Gain §a100% §7chance to receive a
§7normal amount of drops from mobs

§6Jerry
§7Actually adds §c10 damage §7to the
§7Aspect of the Jerry

§6Jerry
§7Tiny chance to find Jerry Candies
§7when killing mobs

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Frozen Jerry Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§7Jerry pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
